admission.FB1: Candidates must hold: (a) NSC endorsed by Umalusi for degree study; (b) senior certificate with matric endorsement; (c) certificate of complete/conditional exemption from Matriculation Board; or (d) a recognised degree.

duration.FB2.1: BAS, BSc(ConstStudies), BSc(PropStudies): minimum 3 academic years.

curriculum.FB3.1: Candidates must comply with curriculum and course requirements prescribed by Senate.
curriculum.FB3.2: Minimum 560 credits for 4-year degrees, 432 credits for 3-year degrees.
curriculum.FB3.3: Curriculum subject to approval of Dean and Head of Department.
curriculum.FB3.4: Timetable clashes not allowed. Priority given to courses in arrears.
curriculum.FB3.5: Cannot withdraw from a repeating course without Dean's permission.

credit_exemption.FB4.1: Credit/exemption may be granted per Rules GB2 and GB3.
credit_exemption.FB4.2: Course credits older than 10 years cannot be carried forward without special Senate permission.

progress.FB5: Academic year determined by expected graduation year.

assessment.FB6.1: Courses assessed by formal examination or review with satisfactory DP performance.
assessment.FB6.2: Formal examination: written/oral examination, tutorials, class tests, term papers.
assessment.FB6.3: DP certificate may be withheld if work incomplete or attendance unsatisfactory.
assessment.FB6.4: DP courses: pass/fail result (PA or DPR).
assessment.FB6.5: Review: assessment by internal examiner(s) of coursework.

supplementary_examinations.FB7.1: Senate may permit supplementary exams: must have DP and at least 45%.
supplementary_examinations.FB7.1_note: Chemical Engineering courses with mandatory reassessments do not offer supplementaries.
supplementary_examinations.FB7.2: TRP: Tutored Reassessment Programme for marks 40-44%, with mandatory attendance.
supplementary_examinations.FB7.3: Senate may permit one additional assessment for one course in final year preventing graduation (min 45%).

readmission.FB8.1_BAS: Cannot renew if: fail major course, fail any course more than once, fail 80% of credits, or cannot complete in 4 years. Min 64 credits/year.
readmission.FB8.2_ChemEng4yr: Cannot renew if: first year fail to get 102 credits (FECR at 66); subsequent years fail 108 credits.
readmission.FB8.3_ChemEng5yr: Cannot renew if: first year fail to get 66 credits (FECR at 48); subsequent years fail 82 credits.
readmission.FB8.8_CivEng4yr: Cannot renew if: first year fail 112 credits (FECR 68, must pass MAM1020F/S and PHY1012F/S plus 32 from others); subsequent years 112 credits.
readmission.FB8.10_ElecEng4yr: Cannot renew if: first year fail 96 credits (FECR 66); subsequent years 116 or 112 credits depending on curriculum.
readmission.FB8.11_MechEng4yr: Cannot renew if: first year fail 116 credits (FECR 90); subsequent years 116 credits.

distinction.FB9.1_BAS: First class pass in Design & Theory Studio III Exam and first class pass or second class (Div 1) in another Studio Exam, plus 3 additional first class passes.
distinction.FB9.2_BSc_Eng_Geomatics: Complete in minimum time, at least first class in research project, and for honours: second class in research project. CWA 65% for honours, 75% for first class honours.
